specs.title: cp-000: Slides in sorter are drag-to-reorder via dnd-kit SortableContext
cp-001: Space key advances to next slidereveal step same as ArrowRight
cp-002: Enter key advances to next slide unless jump buffer is active in which case it j
cp-003: Backspace key goes to previous slide unless jump buffer is active in which case
cp-004: B key toggles black screen mode onoff
cp-005: W key toggles white screen mode onoff
cp-006: N key toggles presenter panel visibility onoff
cp-007: Home key jumps to first slide in presenter mode
cp-008: End key jumps to last slide in presenter mode
cp-009: Number keys typed in presenter mode accumulate in a jump buffer with 15s timeout
cp-010: Jump buffer is displayed in the slide-number input field and submitted via Enter
cp-011: Presenter panel includes an Audience button that opens a separate window at pres
cp-012: Audience window opens with dimensions width1280height720menubarnotoolbarno
cp-013: Presenter uses BroadcastChannelpresenter-slide-sync to sync slide index to audie
cp-014: BroadcastChannel sends init with slide render payload slides masters themeKey th
cp-015: BroadcastChannel sends slide message with current index on each slide change
cp-016: BroadcastChannel sends screen-mode message when blackwhite screen toggles
cp-017: Fullscreen toggle button ArrowsOut icon calls requestFullscreen on the presenter
cp-018: Escape in presenter mode exits fullscreen first if documentfullscreenElement exi
cp-019: Zero visible slides shows No visible slides to present with Exit Presentation bu
cp-020: Empty speaker notes show italic text No speaker notes for this slide
cp-021: Last slide shows End of presentation italic text in the Next Slide section
cp-022: Animation progress text reads Build current of total with optional clickauto bre
cp-023: When reveal sequence is complete progress shows Next click advances slide
cp-024: Presenter help text at bottom reads Keys RightSpaceEnter next LeftBackspace prev
cp-025: Presenter panel toggle button text alternates between Hide Panel N and Show Pane
cp-026: Exit button in presenter has hover class hoverbg-red-60080
cp-027: Notes font size buttons are labeled S M L not Small Medium Large
cp-028: Font size small maps to text-sm medium to text-base large to text-lg
cp-029: Store default transition is fade not none
cp-030: Store default gridSize is 5
cp-031: Store default agentMode is draft
cp-032: Store default rightPanel is properties panel open by default
cp-033: Store default showRulers is false
cp-034: Store default showGrid is false
